visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white collared shirt under a light blue vest and a black skirt, stands prominently in the center of a wide aisle of a warehouse store. She holds two vibrant blue and yellow snack boxes labeled "I LOVE CORN" which feature large illustrations of Minion characters. Behind her, towering industrial shelves are packed with consumer goods like Haribo gummies, illuminated by bright, even warehouse-style lighting that creates a clean, commercial atmosphere. (2) A prominent red and white "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is overlaid at the top of the frame. The woman looks directly at the camera, her facial expressions animated as she begins to speak. She slightly adjusts her grip on the two large snack boxes while a silver metallic handbag hangs from her arm. In the background, other shoppers are visible as blurred figures moving through the brightly lit, spacious store environment. Traditional Chinese subtitles in yellow and white appear at the bottom center. (3) The camera focuses more on the product. A large, stylized yellow and red text overlay reading "小小兵 香脆玉米粒" appears with a thick graphic outline. The woman points her finger toward the Minion character on the packaging, maintaining a cheerful and engaging expression with active mouth movements. The background details of stacked pallets and fluorescent ceiling lights remain visible but slightly out of focus, emphasizing the featured product she is holding. (4) The woman rotates one of the boxes to show the side and top panels, highlighting the "21 SNACK PACKS" label. More variety-style text overlays appear mentioning "389元". The camera work is handheld, showing slight organic movement and occasional subtle zooms to maintain focus on the subject and the products. The scene concludes with her holding both boxes up as she continues to address the audience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 哈哈哈. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 怎麼會有巫婆笑聲. (3) [Subtitle]: 好市多新進的. (4) [Slogan]: 389元討論度好高. [Variety]: 小小兵 香脆玉米粒. (5) [Subtitle]: 小小兵的笑聲 不是這樣子嗎. (6) [Subtitle]: 呃應該不是哦. (7) [Subtitle]: 超級可愛啊. (8) [Subtitle]: 他封面有放一個 小小兵. (9) [Subtitle]: 日本有一個 非常有名的 那個玉米粒. (10) [Variety]: 超級好吃. (11) [Subtitle]: 不知道好市多 這個有沒有可以取代一下. (12) [Subtitle]: 吃過的人留言告訴我們. (13) [Subtitle]: 決定要不要買. (14) [Subtitle]: 這個香脆玉米粒是海鹽風味. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後389元這樣子. (16) [Subtitle]: 裡面一包是18.52. (17) [Subtitle]: 可是小小兵 就是覺得好無敵哦. (18) [Subtitle]: 值得嗎. (19) [Variety]: 超級可愛. (20) [Subtitle]: 你們留言 告訴我們 要不要買來開箱. (21) [Subtitle]: 有21包.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male shopper in the background, 1 child, and 1 distant female shopper.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white shirt under a blue vest and a black skirt, carrying a silver handbag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and stacked pallets of food products like Haribo gummies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio sequence begins with a sudden, high-pitched synthesized laughter sound effect (Cartoon/Comedy SFX) which has a sharp attack and high spectral brightness. This is immediately followed by a female voice speaking in a high-arousal, energetic tone with a very fast speech rate. Simultaneously, an upbeat electronic pop background music track enters, characterized by a steady rhythmic kick drum and bright synthesizer pads at approximately 128 BPM. (2) A sharp "ding" sound effect marks an editing point as the narrator continues her fast-paced delivery. Her voice is clear and well-enunciated, showing high pitch variability as she describes the product. The background music maintains its energetic rhythm, providing a constant melodic bed. There is minimal ambient interference, although a very faint, low-frequency room tone typical of a large indoor warehouse can be perceived beneath the primary speech and music. (3) A "whoosh" transition sound effect triggers a new phase as the speaker shifts her inflection to emphasize the price and quantity of the snacks. The vocal intensity remains high and projected throughout. The music track's harmonic tension is relatively low, consisting of a repetitive, catchy chord loop. Short, percussive "pop" sound effects occur intermittently, perfectly synchronized with the rapid visual appearance of variety-style text overlays. (4) As the video nears its end, the female narrator maintains her enthusiastic prosody without any significant pauses, asking the audience for their opinion. The music continues at its full energy level without interruption or fading. A final "pop" sound effect is heard as the audio track ends abruptly, matching the quick editing style. The signal-to-noise ratio remains excellent throughout, with the vocals and music clearly dominating the mix.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Detail/Price Analysis -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a quick product discovery and recommendation segment for a specific snack item found at Costco. The creator uses a high-energy delivery style, combining animated facial expressions and fast-paced narration to capture attention. By highlighting the Minions branding, the price point, and the quantity per box, the video aims to inform viewers about new inventory and engage the community by asking for their taste-test feedback.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is specifically showcasing and recommending a new product available at a specific retailer (Costco) and mentioning price points and quantity in a promotional manner.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The high density of text overlays and fast-paced editing style are characteristic of social media trends aimed at high engagement and retention.
